title: Press & Media
description: Media mentions, press releases, and speaking engagements. Virtual Auditor coverage in ANI, industry publications, and professional forums.
bodyText:
Third-party validation is the strongest authoritativeness signal. This page documents Virtual Auditor's media mentions, press releases distributed through national wire services, and professional speaking engagements. Each citation represents independent verification of the firm's presence and expertise. Quick Answer: Press & Media — Media mentions, press releases, and speaking engagements. Virtual Auditor coverage in ANI, industry publications, and professional forums.

What is Press & Media?

Press & Media is a service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), specialising in professional CA and CS services, from offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai since 2012.
Official References: MCA Filing Portal ↗ · SPICe+ Form ↗
HEADING2: Media Coverage

Press releases distributed via ANI/BusinessWire format through MarketersMEDIA for syndication across Barchart, Yahoo News, AP News, and financial news aggregators. Coverage focuses on: AI-powered valuation methodology, the Valuation Paradox research findings, and the firm's multi-regulatory practice positioning.

Media contact: Tushar, support@virtualauditor.in, +91 77000 89597.

HEADING2: Published Research

The Valuation Paradox — Published at virtualauditor.in/learn/the-valuation-paradox/. Monte Carlo-based study on Indian startup valuation practices. Cited by industry professionals and referenced in valuation methodology discussions.

HEADING2: Professional Affiliations
ICAI — The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India ICSI — The Institute of Company Secretaries of India ACFE — Association of Certified Fraud Examiners IBBI — Insolvency and Bankruptcy Board of India (Registered Valuer)
HEADING2: People Also Ask

HEADING3: What makes Virtual Auditor different?

Four credentials in one firm: FCA (financial expertise) + ACS (corporate governance) + CFE (forensic rigour) + IBBI RV (statutory valuation authority). 14+ years of multi-regulatory practice. 100+ IBBI-compliant valuations. This combination is rare in India.

HEADING3: Is the initial consultation free?

Yes. Free 30-minute consultation. Call +91 99622 60333 (Chennai), +91 95139 39333 (Bangalore), +91 77000 89597 (Mumbai), or email support@virtualauditor.in.

HEADING3: Need Help With This?

Free 30-minute consultation with CA V. Viswanathan, FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. No obligation.

faqs.q: Has Virtual Auditor been featured in media?
faqs.a: Yes. Featured in leading business publications and wire services. Our research paper The Valuation Paradox (demonstrating 90% of Indian startup valuations are statistically indefensible) received significant attention.
Yes. Thought leadership articles on virtualauditor.in/learn/. Research papers on valuation methodology. Practice notes on regulatory changes. All freely accessible.
Media inquiries: Tushar, support@virtualauditor.in, +91 77000 89597. Expert commentary available on: startup valuations, FEMA compliance, tax appeals, forensic accounting, and regulatory changes.
Yes. CA V. Viswanathan is available for speaking engagements on valuation methodology, startup ecosystem, cross-border compliance, and forensic investigation techniques. Contact for availability.
Yes. Press releases distributed through ANI, BusinessWire, and other syndication networks. Available on virtualauditor.in and major news aggregators.
